result: The R script has successfully executed and created the cleaned data file 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' containing the merged GHQ-12 scores across all four survey sweeps. The file includes the NSID variable and the eight GHQ variables (ghq15, ghq17, ghq25, ghq32, ghqtl15, ghqtl17, ghqtl25, ghqtl32) as factors, ready for analysis.
